metadata.description: 工程技术: Engineering technology is a discipline that applies scientific principles to practical production and problem-solving. It encompasses applied fields such as computer science, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and civil engineering. The core characteristics are practicality, innovation, and systematicness, driving social technological advancement and industrial upgrading. Here's an example of a simple Python code snippet that demonstrates some of these concepts: ```python # Example: A basic control system for a hypothetical machine in an engineering application class Machine: def __init__(self, speed=0): self.speed = speed # Initial speed of the machine def set_speed(self, new_speed): if new_speed >= 0 and new_speed <= 100: # Speed limit self.speed = new_speed else: print("Speed out of range") def get_speed(self): return self.speed # Control system logic def control_system(target_speed, current_speed): if target_speed > current_speed: increase_speed(current_speed, target_speed) elif target_speed < current_speed: decrease_speed(current_speed, target_speed) else: print("Speed is already set to the target value") def increase_speed(current_speed, target_speed): # Simple logic for increasing speed if current_speed + 10 <= target_speed: current_speed += 10 else: current_speed = target_speed def decrease_speed(current_speed, target_speed): # Simple logic for decreasing speed if current_speed - 10 >= target_speed: current_speed -= 10 else: current_speed = target_speed # Example usage machine = Machine() print("Initial Speed:", machine.get_speed()) # Initial Speed: 0 control_system(50, machine.get_speed()) print("Speed after control system intervention:", machine.get_speed()) # Speed after control system intervention: 10 control_system(30, machine.get_speed()) print("Final Speed:", machine.get_speed()) # Final Speed: 30 ``` This example demonstrates practical application (Machine class), innovation in control logic, and systematic approach to setting the speed of a hypothetical machine.
